e59653e43dd31e78b0e596b7e039abab13a30736: {"table_description": "An orders table where each row represents a single customer order, capturing the order's unique identifier, the customer's name, the monetary amount in US dollars, and the timestamp when the order was placed.", "columns": [{"name": "order_id", "description": "Unique integer identifier for each order; sequential and fully distinct across rows.", "role": "identifier"}, {"name": "customer_name", "description": "Free-text name of the customer who placed the order.", "role": "text"}, {"name": "amount_usd", "description": "Monetary value of the order expressed in US dollars, stored as a decimal.", "role": "measure"}, {"name": "order_placed_at", "description": "Date and time when the order was placed.", "role": "timestamp"}], "clarifications": []}
